basic_details.job_title: Kumaun University Technical Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
basic_details.short_information: Kumaun University has released an official notification for Walk-in Interview for 0 Technical Assistant Posts. Eligible candidates can attend the Walk-in Interview on at the Kumaun University office with original documents and self-attested copies.

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.details: Technical Assistant: M.Sc. Botany with experience in In vitro and In silico Analysis of Bioactive Compounds.

content_sections.heading: Kumaun University Technical Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Overview
Kumaun University Technical Assistant Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the Kumaun University Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download Kumaun University Technical Assistant Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: Kumaun University Technical Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
Kumaun University Technical Assistant Selection Process 2026
Walk-In Procedure
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to attend the walk-in interview for Kumaun University Technical Assistant Recruitment 2026 should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before attending the interview. Candidates must report at the venue as per the reporting time mentioned in the notification. Carry all original documents along with one set of self-attested photocopies such as ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if required), and category certificate (if applicable). Bring the duly filled application form if required in the notification. Verify eligibility criteria before attending the interview. Candidates are advised to reach the venue well in advance to complete registration formalities. Keep extra passport-size photographs for submission if required.

content_sections.heading: Kumaun University Technical Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the post name for Kumaun University recruitment?
faq.answer: The post name for the Kumaun University recruitment is Technical Assistant.

faq.question: Q2. What is the total number of vacancies for Technical Assistant?
faq.answer: There is 1 vacancy for the Technical Assistant post.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Technical Assistant post?
faq.answer: The required educational qualification is M.Sc. Botany.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Technical Assistant position?
faq.answer: The salary offered is Rs. 15000 per month, which is fixed.

faq.question: Q5. What is the mode of application for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The mode of application is through a Walk-in Interview.

faq.question: Q6. When is the Walk-in Interview scheduled?
faq.answer: The Walk-in Interview is scheduled for 25 July 2026.

faq.question: Q7. What documents should I carry for the Walk-in Interview?
faq.answer: You should carry original documents, a CV, and one set of photocopies of your documents.

faq.question: Q8. What is the location for the Walk-in Interview?
faq.answer: The Walk-in Interview will be held at Kumaun University, Nainital, Uttarakhand, 263002.

faq.question: Q9. Is there any experience required for the Technical Assistant role?
faq.answer: Yes, experience in In vitro and In silico Analysis of Bioactive Compounds is required.

faq.question: Q10. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: The job type is Project-based.
